manualEntry.title: New manual entry
manualEntry.subtitle: Backfill a past meal. Glucose fields will fill from your CGM history — typing handles the rest.
manualEntry.meal_time_hint: Defaults to now — change to log a historical meal.
manualEntry.review_intro: Please review everything. The glucose values below come from your CGM — if anything is missing, no reading was available in the time window.
manualEntry.err_at_least_one_macro: Enter at least one macro (carbs, protein, fat, or fiber).
manualEntry.err_invalid_meal_time: Please pick a valid meal time.
manualEntry.err_carbs_too_high: Carbs look too high — please double-check (max 500g).
manualEntry.err_insulin_range: Insulin must be between 0 and 50 units.
manualEntry.err_glucose_range: Glucose before must be between 30 and 600 mg/dL.
manualEntry.err_bg1h_range: 1h reading must be between 30 and 600 mg/dL.
manualEntry.err_bg2h_range: 2h reading must be between 30 and 600 mg/dL.

mealEdit.title: Edit entry
mealEdit.footer_note: Meal type and outcome are recalculated automatically after saving.

log.title: Log Meal
log.voice_unsupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser
log.voice_example: e.g. "a handful of blueberries, small banana, 200g yogurt"
log.proposed_macros_hint: You can adjust these in the next step.
log.any_input_hint: Speak, type, or enter macros to continue
log.reasoning_historical: Based on {count, plural, one {1 similar meal} other {# similar meals}} with GOOD outcomes (±12g carbs, ±35 mg/dL glucose). Historical average insulin: {avg}u.
log.reasoning_blended: Blended from {count, plural, one {1 similar meal} other {# similar meals}} + ICR formula. Limited historical data — log more meals for higher confidence.
log.reasoning_formula: No similar historical meals found. Standard ICR formula: {carbs}g ÷ {icr} + {correction}u correction.
log.chat_intro: Once you log a meal (voice or text), GPT will explain how it broke down the macros here. You can ask follow-ups or push back — corrections you confirm are applied to the form.
log.chat_placeholder: Ask or correct… e.g. 'the banana was big'
log.chat_subtitle: See how these macros were chosen — or correct them
log.chat_parse_failed: ⚠ Parsing failed — you can fill in the fields manually.
log.meal_time_hint: When you ate. Default: last CGM reading time — edit to backfill.
log.macros_chip_hint: Carbs are required · calories auto-calculated otherwise
log.correction_bolus_hint: This dose corrects a previous meal (rather than accompanying one).
log.correction_no_recent: No meal in the last 6 hours.
log.discard_confirm: Discard input? All fields will be cleared.
log.error_session_expired: Session expired, please log in again.
log.error_cgm_no_credentials: No CGM credentials. Go to Settings to connect LibreLinkUp.
log.error_cgm_unavailable: CGM service unavailable, please try again in a minute.

engine.title: Glev Engine
engine.nutrition_source_explain_database: All values sourced from verified food databases (Open Food Facts + USDA).
engine.nutrition_source_explain_mixed: Mix of database values and AI estimates for ingredients not found in the databases.
engine.nutrition_source_explain_estimated: Values are AI estimates — please verify before saving.
engine.nutrition_source_explain_unknown: At least one ingredient couldn't be matched to a database or estimated. Please review or enter values manually before dosing insulin.
engine.no_estimate_body: No estimate available. Please go back to step 2 and recalculate.
engine.disclaimer_body: Glev Engine provides decision support only. Always consult your endocrinologist before adjusting insulin doses. This tool is not a medical device.
engine.voice_unavailable_hint: Voice input is not available in this browser — please use the chat below.
engine.reason_historical: Based on {count} similar past meals with GOOD outcomes (±12g carbs, ±35 mg/dL glucose). Historical average insulin: {avg} {units}.
engine.reason_blended: Blended from {count} similar meal(s) + ICR formula. Limited historical data — log more meals for higher confidence.
engine.reason_formula: No similar historical meals found. Using standard ICR formula: {carbs}g ÷ {icr} + {correction} {units} correction.
engine.safety_stacking: ⚠ Stacking risk: {count} bolus doses in the last 6h (Σ {total} {units}). Active insulin may overlap — dose carefully.
engine.safety_exercise: Activity: {minutes} min {type} ({intensity}) in the last 4h — increased insulin sensitivity possible.

engineLog.backdated_hint: Back-dated — {when}. No live CGM, values pulled from history.
engineLog.default_now_hint: Default: now. Up to 365 days back-datable.
engineLog.insulin_disclaimer: Glev doesn't calculate doses — you log what you injected. The CGM value is pulled automatically on submit.
engineLog.exercise_disclaimer: The CGM reading at log time helps Glev correlate exercise with glucose responses.
engineLog.footer_note_body: Insulin and exercise logs are pure documentation. Glev doesn't calculate doses or make insulin recommendations — that's between you and your diabetes team.
engineLog.exercise_logged_no_cgm: Logged — {minutes} min {type} ({intensity}){when}. No CGM reading available.

insights.tile_raw_icr_explain: Naive average of carbs ÷ insulin over the last 7 meals. Ignores whether the dose actually landed in target — spikes and overdoses count the same as good outcomes. The Adaptive Engine ICR above is the smarter, outcome-weighted version.
insights.tile_avg_glucose_explain: Average pre-meal glucose. Lower reflects better fasting control.
insights.tile_good_rate_explain: Share of meals where the dose was within ±35% of the ICR estimate.
insights.tile_avg_insulin_explain: Mean insulin per meal. Track against carbs to validate your ratio.
insights.pattern_balanced_explanation: {pct}% of your last {n} meals landed in target — keep it up.
insights.card_time_in_range_empty: Log meals with pre-meal glucose to see your time-in-range.
insights.card_meal_evaluation_empty: Log meals with post-meal glucose to see your distribution.

settings.title: Settings
settings.language_confirm_body: The app will reload to load the new language. Unsaved input will be lost.
settings.appearance_hint: Choose how Glev looks. System follows your device setting.
settings.page_subtitle: Manage your profile and Glev settings.
settings.historical_data_desc: Replace your meal log with the 15 historical entries from the tracking sheet (Apr 17–22, 2026). Useful for resetting the app to a known demo state.
settings.historical_confirm: This will replace ALL your meal entries with the historical sample data (Apr 17–22, 2026). Continue?
settings.notif_critical_desc: Push on lows (<70 mg/dL) and highs (>250 mg/dL). Delivered immediately outside quiet hours.
settings.notif_smart_soon: Coming soon — learns your usual meal times and nudges you.
settings.notif_quiet_desc: Non-critical pushes are paused inside this window.
settings.daily_macros_desc: Powers the "Today's Macros" rings on the dashboard. Defaults are sensible Type-1 starting points — adjust to match your nutrition plan. Saved to your account, syncs across devices.
settings.google_sheets_desc: Sync meals, insulin, and CGM into a spreadsheet.
settings.google_sheets_footnote: Connect your Google account to automatically mirror your Glev data into your own Google sheet. Comes after the CSV/PDF export feature.
settings.footer_disclaimer: Glev is a documentation and organization tool, not a medical device. Discuss treatment decisions with your physician.
settings.sheet_units_body: Glev currently operates exclusively in mg/dL. A switch to mmol/L is planned for a future update.
settings.sheet_dexcom_body: Native Dexcom G6/G7 connection is planned after the beta launch. In the meantime you can mirror Dexcom values via Nightscout.
settings.carb_unit_hint: How should carbohydrates be displayed? Calculations and storage stay in grams — only the display changes.
settings.historical_intro: Resets your meal log to the historical demo entries (Apr 17–22, 2026). Useful for bringing Glev back to a known state.
settings.last_appointment_hint: Save the date of your last appointment. The Export panel will then show a one-click "Since last appointment" preset for exactly that window.

import.page_subtitle: Import historical meal data from a CSV. Columns are auto-mapped and dates are preserved.
import.sheets_subtitle: Pull your historical history from the configured Google spreadsheet.
import.expected_format_help: Columns are auto-detected. Supported: date, meal/food/description, glucose/bg, carbs, protein, fat, fiber, calories, insulin/dose, evaluation/result.
import.no_rows_detected: No valid rows detected. Check that your CSV format matches the expected structure above.

export.header_subtitle: Download your Glev data as CSV. UTF-8 with BOM, opens cleanly in Excel, Numbers and Google Sheets.
export.row_meals_desc: All logged meals with macros, insulin and glucose history.
export.row_insulin_desc: All bolus and basal entries with CGM follow-up readings.
export.row_exercise_desc: All exercise entries with duration, intensity and glucose values.
export.row_fingersticks_desc: All manually logged glucose values from fingersticks.
export.pdf_info_body: : formatted overview with Time-in-Range, insulin sums, meal and fingerstick history — suitable for printing or attaching for your doctor.
export.carb_unit_note: Carbohydrates are exported in {unit}, matching your preference. Insulin exports also include your current ICR in the same unit (e.g. {unit}/IE). You can switch between grams, BE and KE on the Settings page.
export.range_help: Pick the slice of history to export. Useful for e.g. "since my last appointment" — keeps the PDF report compact.
export.count_loading: Counting entries in the selected range…
export.count_empty: No entries in the selected range.
export.count_insulin: {n, plural, one {# insulin entry} other {# insulin entries}}
export.count_exercise: {n, plural, one {# exercise entry} other {# exercise entries}}

fingerstick.err_value_range: Value must be between 20 and 600 mg/dL.
fingerstick.footnote: Independent of CGM — only manually logged readings.

nightscout.title: Nightscout
nightscout.subtitle: Use your own Nightscout server as a CGM source (URL + API token).
nightscout.err_url_protocol: Nightscout URL must start with http:// or https://.
nightscout.err_default: Connection failed — check the URL, token and that your Nightscout instance is reachable.
nightscout.confirm_disconnect: Really disconnect Nightscout? You'll need to re-enter the URL and token.

about.description: Glev helps you log meals, track CGM trends, and learn your personal insulin response — every meal becomes better data.

postMeal.title: BG after {label}
postMeal.err_range: Please enter a value between 20 and 600 mg/dL.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle_count: {n} entries logged. Hold any card to reorder · click to flip.
dashboard.control_score_formula: Score = Good% × 0.7 + (100 − Spike% − Hypo%) × 0.3, last 7 days.
dashboard.control_score_explain: Rewards correctly dosed meals, penalises over- and under-doses. Badges: STRONG ≥ 80 · GOOD ≥ 60 · POOR < 60.
dashboard.good_explanation: The percentage of meals where your insulin dose was in the optimal range — neither too high nor too low.
dashboard.good_interpretation: Target >70%. Each GOOD outcome means your dose was within ±35% of the ICR-calculated ideal.
dashboard.spike_explanation: Meals where insulin was insufficient. Under-dosing leads to glucose spikes, which increase HbA1c long-term.
dashboard.spike_interpretation: Target <15%. Consistent under-dosing suggests your ICR or correction factor needs adjustment.
dashboard.hypo_explanation: Meals where insulin exceeded requirements. Over-dosing risks hypoglycemia, which can be dangerous.
dashboard.hypo_interpretation: Target <10%. If rising, reduce correction factor or ICR temporarily.
dashboard.outcome_basis: Based on CGM readings 60–90 min after the meal.
dashboard.outcome_good_desc: Glucose within +30 mg/dL of the pre-value 1 h after the meal. The goal.
dashboard.outcome_under_desc: Glucose stayed clearly elevated — more insulin or earlier injection.
dashboard.outcome_over_desc: Glucose dropped below the pre-value — less insulin or later injection.
dashboard.outcome_spike_desc: Short spike above threshold — set the pre-bolus earlier.
dashboard.tip_no_meals: No meals logged yet today — add your first meal to start tracking.
dashboard.tip_all_on_track: All macros tracking close to target today — nice work.
dashboard.tip_lowest: {label} is at {pct}% of target — consider adding more in your next meal.
dashboard.no_entries_yet: No entries yet. Log your first meal.

marketing.hero_subtitle: Glev reads your glucose, spots the trend, and shows you the pattern — so you and your diabetologist can decide with confidence.
marketing.hero_cta_tertiary: Or just reserve a spot for €19 →
marketing.pain_title: You're making decisions with incomplete data.
marketing.pain_b1: A single value tells you nothing — the direction does.
marketing.pain_b2: Same meal, different day, different outcome.
marketing.pain_b3: No clear picture of which meals affect your BG, and how.
marketing.step1_body: "two slices of whole-grain bread with butter and one egg"
marketing.step2_title: AI returns macros and your CGM value appears automatically
marketing.step2_body: Carbs, protein, fat — visible instantly, next to your current glucose value.
marketing.step3_title: Correct if needed, dose, everything is logged
marketing.step3_body: Logging a meal takes no longer than a single breath.
marketing.trio_voice_text: Voice input, AI parser. "Pasta with tomato sauce, 80g noodles and an apple." → macros in 2s.
marketing.trio_cgm_text: FreeStyle Libre 2 is connected. Glucose is stored alongside the log — pre-meal & post-meal.
marketing.trio_control_text: Glev documents. You and your doctor decide.
marketing.deepdive_voice_body: You speak your meal, Glev understands foods, quantities and preparations. Faster than any tap form.
marketing.deepdive_macro_title: AI macro calculation with your right to correct
marketing.deepdive_macro_body: The AI estimates carbs, protein and fat. You can override every value by tap or voice — atomicity is preserved.
marketing.deepdive_cgm_body: Glev connects to your FreeStyle Libre 2 via LibreLinkUp and shows your current glucose value right in the log flow. Before and after every meal.
marketing.deepdive_insights_body: All your meals, insulin doses and glucose values over time — structured, with a learned carb ratio, good-rate and trends you can share in your diabetologist appointment.
marketing.pricing_subtitle: Before the public launch on July 1, 2026 — two ways to lock in better terms than will be available after launch.
marketing.pricing_beta_b1: Reservation credited toward your first subscription
marketing.pricing_beta_b2: €4.50/month for the first year after launch
marketing.pricing_pro_b1: Card on file today, first charge on launch day (July 1, 2026)
marketing.pricing_pro_b2: Direct founder-Slack access for feedback and questions
marketing.pricing_pro_b3: Lifetime price lock — €24.90/month forever, even after future price increases
marketing.pricing_pro_b4: Early access to new CGM integrations (Dexcom, Nightscout) as they ship
marketing.pricing_pro_b5: A vote on the feature roadmap
marketing.faq_q1: What does Glev cost after the public launch?
marketing.faq_a1: From July 1, 2026, Glev is available as a standard subscription for €9/month. Reserving early or starting as a Pro member locks in founder pricing that won't be available later — the beta reservation gives €4.50/month for the first year (instead of €9), and the Pro membership locks in €24.90/month for life.
marketing.faq_a2: Currently usable: FreeStyle Libre 2 and 3 via LibreLinkUp. Dexcom G6/G7, Dexcom One+ and Medtronic are in progress (coming soon).
marketing.faq_a3: No. Glev is a documentation and organization tool. Therapy decisions stay between you and your doctor.
marketing.faq_a4: In the EU (Supabase Frankfurt). German GDPR. No data sharing, no advertising.
marketing.footer_legal_aria: Privacy policy and terms of service
marketing.footer_disclaimer: Glev is a documentation and organization tool, not a medical device. You make therapy decisions in consultation with your doctor.
marketing.welcome_choose_password: Choose a password to finish setting up your Glev beta access.
marketing.welcome_err_email: Could not determine the email from the Stripe session. Please contact support.
marketing.welcome_err_auth: Auth service not configured. Please contact support.
marketing.welcome_err_password_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.
marketing.welcome_notice_check_email: Account created! Please confirm your email via the link in your inbox, then you can log in.
marketing.welcome_invalid_default_body: This page is only available after a successful beta reservation.
marketing.welcome_invalid_no_session_body: The session ID is missing from the URL. Click the "Complete registration" button in your welcome email again.
marketing.welcome_invalid_not_found_body: Stripe doesn't recognize this checkout session (anymore). This happens very rarely, and the fastest fix is by email — drop us a line at hello@glev.app and we'll set up your access manually.
marketing.welcome_invalid_not_paid_body: This Stripe session was started, but the payment didn't go through. If that was a mistake you can restart below — or write to hello@glev.app if you're sure you paid.
marketing.welcome_invalid_network_body: Please reload the page in a few seconds. If it keeps failing, contact hello@glev.app — we'll help quickly.

account.title: Account
account.upgrade_body: Free until public launch — secure your beta seat now.
account.row_change_password_sub: We'll send you a reset link by email.
account.password_failed: Failed to send — please try again.
